extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder tool configuration panel for the ServiceNow tool named "Update ServiceNow Incident." The tool’s name, disabled tool selector, and description are visible, along with configured argument description chips for Assignee, IncidentID, Category, and Subcategory. The UI indicates the tool has already been set up with descriptive metadata for each input field.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the completed configuration for the Update ServiceNow Incident tool: verify the Name is "Update ServiceNow Incident," confirm the Description says "Updates the category, subcategory and the assignee of a ServiceNow incident.", and ensure the argument descriptions are set for Assignee, IncidentID, Category, and Subcategory.
